title: Mark09 Seele Type Adams Vessel Split
display_title: Mark09 Seele Type Adams Vessel Split
wikitext:
[]: Mark.09 - Seele Type Adam's Vessel [Split]             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Aug 29, 2014 5:06 pm [Split from "What are the "Adams"?" . - OMF] Well here's something interesting that got buried under the NTV broadcast blog posts http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3251.html The Sega Mark.09 figure is titled 「第１のアダムスの器（移行中間形態）ゼーレ仕様」 Specifically labeling it as the first Adams' Vessel

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Aug 29, 2014 5:52 pm So that mean that there is three more of these fuckers around? And coincidentally we have three pilot who don't have an Eva anymore! More seriously, maybe the three other were/are Units 10, 11 and 12, it would stand to reason that SEELE weaponized the fours Vessels into Evas consecutively. Now the question if there is really three other ADAM's vessels and they weren't destroyed during the timeskip, then where they are?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Aug 29, 2014 6:08 pm Well, for all we know this is Wille's designation of how many they've encountered total. It could be more than 4. A vessel could break but the thing its made to contain still exist. 移行中間形態 ("Midway through switching forms?" Wait, is this literally kanjispam for THIS ISN'T EVEN MY FINAL FORM! ) and ゼーレ仕様 (Seele type) Both elaborate on the specificity of that particular vessel, so maybe there will be.... a billion or so more? Maybe MP Mark.06s from the preview are all made as vessels and seek a chunk of the Adam to complete themselves? Would save on the programming if they're driven by instinct. I could easily see them being called Nerv type Adams vessels in their first form, and maybe as few of them succeed they become something more?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Aug 29, 2014 6:21 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: 移行中間形態 ("Midway through switching forms?" Wait, is this literally kanjispam for THIS ISN'T EVEN MY FINAL FORM! )

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Aug 30, 2014 9:48 pm The four so called Adams we see are either GNRs that for some reason show their cores after absorbing Adam, Unit 01s, or an odd combination of Adam/Lilith that actually show attributes of both.

[]:             Quote Post by Jäeger » Sun Aug 31, 2014 3:46 am ChaddyManPrime wrote: The four so called Adams we see are either GNRs that for some reason show their cores after absorbing Adam, Unit 01s, or an odd combination of Adam/Lilith that actually show attributes of both.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Aug 31, 2014 6:41 am ^ It's doubtful EVA-01 is a repurposed ADAM, according to Mari, they can't raise an AT Field (which is why EVA-13 needed the RS Hoppers to defend itself), and Unit 01 can do it. It's possible that like in NGE, it was made from Lilith's flesh, since in Rebuild too she have her lower body missing (which was used to "build" EVA-01 in NGE)

[]:             Quote Post by Jäeger » Sun Aug 31, 2014 6:48 am ElMariachi wrote: ^ It's doubtful EVA-01 is a repurposed ADAM, according to Mari, they can't raise an AT Field (which is why EVA-13 needed the RS Hoppers to defend itself), and Unit 01 can do it. It's possible that like in NGE, it was made from Lilith's flesh, since in Rebuild too she have her lower body missing (which was used to "build" EVA-01 in NGE)

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Aug 31, 2014 7:31 am You left out the only one specifically called out as an Adam: the Mark 09. Well, it was called an "Adam's Vessel", but IMO that's just admitting the Adam has been turned into something else. But anyway, we're speculating with the Mark 06 and Eva 13, but we're sure about the Mark 09. And those three Evas are not like Unit 01. Me, I think 2I occurred because the fourth Adam blew up, meaning Unit 01 is a copy of Lilith while the other three are repurposed Adams.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Aug 31, 2014 8:23 am Seriously, Mark.09 is so weird compared to everything else that it can be a category of its own, Mari said that Mark.09 was an ADAM's Vessel when she blew off Mark.09's head, hinting that there are or were others like it, if it was one of the four ADAMs that was repurposed like EVA-13, she would had plainly said that it was "one of the surviving ADAMs".

[]:             Quote Post by Jäeger » Sun Aug 31, 2014 8:37 am Bagheera wrote: You left out the only one specifically called out as an Adam: the Mark 09. Well, it was called an "Adam's Vessel", but IMO that's just admitting the Adam has been turned into something else. But anyway, we're speculating with the Mark 06 and Eva 13, but we're sure about the Mark 09. And those three Evas are not like Unit 01. Me, I think 2I occurred because the fourth Adam blew up, meaning Unit 01 is a copy of Lilith while the other three are repurposed Adams.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Aug 31, 2014 9:01 am ElMariachi wrote: Seriously, Mark.09 is so weird compared to everything else that it's be a category of its own, Mari said that Mark.09 was an ADAM's Vessel when she blew off Mark.09's head, hinting that there are or were other like it, of it was one of the four ADAMs that was repurposed like EVA-13, she would had plainly said that it was "one of the surviving ADAMs".

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Aug 31, 2014 9:21 am Oh hai!, missing numbers 10, 11, 12?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Aug 31, 2014 9:32 am pwhodges wrote: Oh hai!, missing numbers 10, 11, 12?

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Aug 31, 2014 10:55 am Yes, I remembered 7 later. I have no theory for that.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Aug 31, 2014 11:15 am Was Unit 01's "third eye" identified as such by the CRC or some other supplement? That always looked like the glowing ring(s) around the helmet's horn to me. Edit- So 13 and the Mark.06 are mostly confirmed for Adams, and the Mark.09 is a "vessel." It could have a piece of an Adam inside it, like the Angel Carriers in Anima, but I wonder if it might be a vessel in the same sense the original Evas were: a man-made vessel body that's playing host to the soul of an Adam, maybe one that exploded, caused Second Impact, and sent its comrades on trips to Japan and the Moon. That could explain why it's so weird even by Eva standards. There's another Adam candidate that might have been overlooked too: the now-destroyed Eva 04. With no mention of S2 engine development in Rebuild, it is a little suspicious that it's still a testbed for new Eva tech and the Mark.06 rolls into action not even a week later. Plus, the explosion it creates has ragged concentric rings, like the ones at the edge of Unit 01's halo.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Aug 31, 2014 12:03 pm pwhodges wrote: Oh hai!, missing numbers 10, 11, 12?

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sun Aug 31, 2014 2:07 pm The Adams are humans that accidentally stumbled into a microverse. Everything in NTE is actually really tiny.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun Aug 31, 2014 2:40 pm @ El Thank you for pointing that out to him, I really didn't know how to correct him without sounding like a total asshole.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sun Aug 31, 2014 5:44 pm Bagheera wrote: You left out the only one specifically called out as an Adam: the Mark 09. Well, it was called an "Adam's Vessel", but IMO that's just admitting the Adam has been turned into something else.
